functions.name: xlpkg.dj_u.f_nearbyaddr
documentation:
s = ''
s += 'isDefault=' + d['isDefault']
s += '&isShopAddress=' + d['isShopAddress']

s += cid
s += str(ts)
s += cv
s += token
s += sk

# print('string9999:' + s)
obj = hashlib.md5(s.encode())
sign = obj.hexdigest()
s += sign

functions.name: xlpkg.dj_u.f_addrlist
documentation:
s = ''
s+='current='+d['current']
s+='&isShopAddress='+d['isShopAddress']
s+='&likeQuery='+ d['likeQuery']
s+='&size='+d['size']

s += cid
s += str(ts)
s += cv
s += token
s += sk
# print('string9999:' + s)

sign = obj.hexdigest()
s += sign

functions.name: xlpkg.dj_u.f_add_addr
documentation:
s = ''
s += 'address='     +d['address']
s += '&gender='     +d['gender']
s += '&isDefault='  +d['isDefault']
s += '&latitude='   +d['latitude']
s += '&longitude='  +d['longitude']
s += '&mobile='     +d['mobile']
s += '&name='       +d['name']
s += '&userAddress='+d['userAddress']
s += cid
s += str(ts)
s += cv
s += token
s += sk
# print('string9999:' + s)
obj = hashlib.md5(s.encode())
sign = obj.hexdigest()
s += sign

functions.name: xlpkg.dj_u.f_fd
documentation:
s = ''
s+='address='           +d['address']
s+='&deliveryFee='      +d['deliveryFee']
s+='&fromId='           +d['fromId']
s+='&fromType='         +d['fromType']
s+='&goodsType='        +d['goodsType']
s+='&mobile='           +d['mobile']
s+='&name='             +d['name']
s+='&pickTime='         +d['pickTime']
s+='&remark='           +d['remark']
s+='&tag='              +d['tag']
s+='&tip='              +d['tip']
s+='&to2UserAddress='   +d['to2UserAddress']
s+='&toAddress='        +d['toAddress']
s+='&toGender='         +d['toGender']
s+='&toId='             +d['toId']
s+='&toLatitude='       +d['toLatitude']
s+='&toLongitude='      +d['toLongitude']
s+='&toMobile='         +d['toMobile']
s+='&toName='           +d['toName']
s+='&type='             +d['type']
s+='&unionPay='         +d['unionPay']
s+='&userAddress='      +d['userAddress']

s += cid
s += str(ts)
s += cv
s += token
s += sk

# print('string9999:' + s)
obj = hashlib.md5(s.encode())
sign = obj.hexdigest()
s += sign

functions.name: xlpkg.x1.f_in_polygon
documentation: 判断一个点是否在一个多边形区域内。
使用射线交点法。通过从给定点引一条射线，然后计算这条射线与多边形边的交点数量来判断点是否在多边形内部。如果交点数量是奇数，点在多边形内部；如果是偶数，点在多边形外部。
